name: INFLAMMATORY PSEUDOTUMOR OF BLADDER

demographics.Histo: loosely packed spindle cells within myxoid matrix
demographics.Location: reported in every organ of body

dominant_finding: heterogeneous mass with central hyperintense component surrounded by hypointense
distribution: reported in every organ of body
discriminating_features: locally aggressive single exophytic / polypoid 2-8 cm bladder mass ± ulceration
may invade through bladder wall with extravesical component
ringlike peripheral enhancement + poor central enhancement ← necrosis
heterogeneous mass with central hyperintense component surrounded by hypointense
